texto: As a kid. I insisted I could see what I couldn't. And my lone hope was my belief that what I couldn't see still existed somewhere. And I now feel like throwing that past away and taking one step foward. ..But I really don't know where I'm now headed, and that makes me anxious.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Filipus Liandy Ciptan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “As a kid. I insisted I could see what I couldn't. And my lone hope was my belief that what I coul…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, human, couldn pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: As a kid. I insisted I could see what I couldn't. And my lone hope was my belief that what I couldn't see still existed somewhere. And I now feel like throwing that past away and taking one step foward. ..But I really don't know where I'm now headed, and that makes me anxious.
